titleStmt.title: SII 19.384: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 384. (A.R. No. 245 of 1925.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa, VAṬAMŪLĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 5 sheep for the supply of ghee for the sacred bath of the god on the day of Uttarāyaṇa-Sankrānti every year in the temple of Tiruvālandurai-Mahādēva at Śiṟu-Paḻuvūr in Kuṉṟa-kūṟṟam by Kauśiyaṉ Māṟaṉ of Maṅgalam in Maṅgala-nāḍu, who is stated to have supervised the construction (?) of the temple built by Paḻavēṭṭaraīyar Maṟavaṉ Kaṇḍaṉār. A māgāṇi of land was also endowed by him for growing tumbai plants for the daily supply of a nāḻi of flowers to the god. This is assignable to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecari va
rmmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu kuṉ
ṟakkuṟṟattu brahmadeyam
ciṟu paḻuvūr tiruvālantuṟai
mahādevarkku Uttaramayana m
paṟṟiṉa Ayaṉasaṅkirāntikku
Āṭiaruḷa maṅkalanāṭṭu maṅkala
ttu maṅkalamuṭaiya kauci
yaṉ māṟaṉṉeṉ Āṭiaruḷa vai
tta ṉey nārāyattāl Aiñ
ñāḻiyāl Āṭu Añcu śrī
koyi leṭuppicca paḻa
veṭṭaraiyar maṟavan
kaṇṭa(ṉ)ṉār Aru(ḷ)ḷā(lā)l
leṭuppitta māṟapirāṉ va
ttitu Ivane tiruvālan
tuṟainallūrkkuḷattil I
raṇṭerippaṭikku naṭuveṉ
ṟey mākāṇi nilamum (nica)
nicca nāḻi tumpaipū Aṭṭa
tevarnāḻiyāl Aṭṭuvārkku
vaittitu .
Digital edition of SII 19.384 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
